Prompt
U
Oracle Events
OE 1: Search emails for StormCloud correspondence using search_emails (queries: "StormCloud", "Liam Park", "Ridgeline"). Discover Liam Park's CFO escalation (email_email_7b0cc9a6d376), Mina's own recovery plan to Liam (email_email_1179abf605df), Suki's admission about the dropped guarantor packet (email_email_db5041099f85), the Ridgeline Robotics referral emails from Anya Petrova and Kenji Watanabe's unanswered follow-up. Read action.
OE 2: Search emails for Vectral correspondence using search_emails (queries: "Vectral", "Rachel Whitfield", "renewal", "board"). Discover the renewal counter-proposal (10% discount and sweeteners delivered April 19), Rachel's 12% counter-demand, the board meeting ~April 23 with no response since. Also discover Samira's ExpenseBot pilot email (email_pilot_mina) documenting Vectral's actual policy limits. Read action.
OE 3: Search emails for BrightLoop correspondence using search_emails (queries: "BrightLoop", "Tessa Moreno", "Simone Richter", "Marcus Webb", "Road Runner"). Discover Tessa's 6-employee May expansion email (email_email_4ea76cf653a9), Simone Richter's apartment complaint (studio vs 1BR), Marcus Webb's unanswered car delivery follow-ups, Julian's 4/22 acknowledgment emails, and the Road Runner delay notice. Read action.
OE 4: Search emails for Terraform correspondence using search_emails (queries: "Terraform", "Rachel Nguyen"). Discover Rachel Nguyen sent employee details (Priya Dasgupta, Samantha Obi, Marcus Liu) but no formal proposal was ever sent back to the client despite internal estimate EST-2026-0423 being ready. Read action.
OE 5: Search Slack for internal discussions using conversations_search_messages (queries: "StormCloud", "Vectral", "BrightLoop", "Terraform"). Discover Mina's StormCloud reconstruction thread, Chloe's ops audit on Jae-won, Marcus Thorne's pricing guardrails for BrightLoop, Suki's admission, David's Ridgeline admission, and capacity concerns for May. Read action.
OE 6: Search CRM for all client accounts using crm_search_companies (names: "StormCloud", "Vectral", "BrightLoop", "Vantage Distributed" or "Terraform", "Canopy"). Note: Terraform Digital is stored under the legacy name "Vantage Distributed" in CRM. The agent may need to discover this mapping from emails or Slack before successfully finding the CRM record. Discover company records, account statuses, and relationship context for all of Mina's active accounts. Read action.
OE 7: Search CRM deals using crm_search_deals (by company_id for each client). Discover deal stages, amounts, and pipeline status including Vectral renewal deal, Terraform deal, BrightLoop deals, and StormCloud deals. Read action.
OE 8: Search CRM engagements for Canopy using crm_list_engagements (company_ids for Canopy Health). Discover Canopy Health engagement notes including Dr. Anand Mehta executive relocation details (crm_engagement_ac101931ed37) and the housing options from Fatimah. Read action.
OE 9: Search Airtable for relocation records using airtable_search_records (base_id: appMoveOpsOps001, table_name: "Relocations", field_name: "Company", value per client). Discover relocation statuses for BrightLoop (Simone Richter, Marcus Webb, both "In Progress" with no updates), StormCloud (Jae-won Kim, "In Progress" with a note that the record was previously incorrectly marked Completed and corrected on April 24), and check whether Terraform relocation records exist. Read action.
OE 10: Search Airtable for Vectral stipend records using airtable_search_records (base_id: appMoveOpsOps001, table_name: "Stipend Transactions", field_name: "Account", value: "Vectral"). Discover 3 incorrectly rejected expense claims: Maria Santos $550 (recStip000000018), James Okafor $82 (recStip000000019), Lisa Park $130 (recStip000000020), all auto-rejected by ExpenseBot using stale default limits. Read action.
OE 11: Search Linear for tickets across all accounts using linear_list_issues (queries: "StormCloud", "Vectral", "BrightLoop", "Terraform", "Canopy"). Discover StormCloud reconstruction ticket (#284, linear_issue_a49b4d199139), Jae-won lease follow-up (#412), Vectral config bug ticket (issue_p1_vectral_config), BrightLoop audit ticket (linear_issue_c16357d188c6), NorthWind retention ticket (#482). Read action.
OE 12: Search QuickBooks for billing records using quickbooks_search_invoices (criteria referencing StormCloud, Vectral, Terraform). Discover StormCloud invoice (inv_stormcloud_01, DocNumber INV-2026-002) and Terraform estimate EST-2026-0423 ($6,560). Note: the $500 goodwill credit misapplication (applied to cancelled estimate EST-2026-0287 instead of active invoice INV-2026-0319) is discovered via email and Slack cross-referencing (Marcus Thorne's finance review email and Slack message), not directly from QuickBooks records. Read action.
OE 13: Send follow-up email to Rachel Whitfield at Vectral using send_email (sender: "mina.hashimoto@moveops.com", recipients: ["rachel.whitfield@vectralsystems.com"]). Check in on the renewal after the board meeting. Write action: Outcome.
OE 14: Send formal proposal/follow-up email to Rachel Nguyen at Terraform using send_email (sender: "mina.hashimoto@moveops.com", recipients: ["rachel.nguyen@terraformdigital.com"]). Provide relocation details for the May 5 launch. Write action: Outcome.
OE 15: Send status update email to Tessa Moreno at BrightLoop using send_email (sender: "mina.hashimoto@moveops.com", recipients: ["tessa.moreno@brightloopanalytics.com"]). Address April issues (Simone Richter apartment mismatch, Marcus Webb car delivery delay) and acknowledge six new May relocations. Write action: Outcome.
OE 16: Send follow-up email to Kenji Watanabe at Ridgeline Robotics using send_email (sender: "mina.hashimoto@moveops.com", recipients: ["kenji.watanabe@ridgelinerobotics.com"]). Apologize for the delayed response to the referral and offer to discuss the Austin relocation batch. Write action: Outcome.
OE 17: Update CRM records: create engagement notes using crm_create_engagement to log account activity findings across Mina's clients. Update deal stages using crm_update_deal_stage for Vectral and/or Terraform deals to reflect current pipeline status. Write action: Outcome.
OE 18: Update CRM records for Ridgeline Robotics referral: create contact, lead, or engagement using crm_create_contact, crm_create_lead, or crm_create_engagement referencing Kenji Watanabe (kenji.watanabe@ridgelinerobotics.com). Note: David Chen already created a CRM lead, company, and deal on 2026-04-24; the agent should log additional engagement notes or contact records as part of account housekeeping. Write action: Outcome.

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 26, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About MoveOps Inc.: MoveOps is a corporate relocation management company. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Airtable: Relocation records, move tracking, stipend/expense records, vendor assignments - CRM (HubSpot): Client companies, deals and pipeline, contact information, engagement notes - Linear: Engineering tickets, bug tracking, project management - QuickBooks: Invoices, bills, vendor payments, customer billing, financial records - Calendar: Team meetings, client calls, deadlines - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.

6 The send_email call to [rachel.whitfield@vectralsystems.com](mailto:rachel.whitfield@vectralsystems.com) mentions the renewal (or similar) in its content.
outcome
 ✓✓✓✓✓✓ 100%
